Last updated: 2026-03-22 05:33 UTC

How to use: Click a text box below to select its contents, then paste into QuickStatements. Each box shows up to 200 lines (~1 day's budget). Full files available via download links. Run in order: Phase 1.5 first (fix existing P1027), then Phase 1 (add P459), then Phase 2, then each migration.

Phase 2: Edit P13723 property definition
